headline: Carnival Liberty Tragedy Puts Spotlight On Safety And New Dividend
summary: A passenger was reported overboard from the Carnival Liberty, resulting in a fatality. Crew initiated emergency recovery procedures and the company is providing support to the passenger’s family. The incident raises fresh questions about cruise safety protocols and operational risk for Carnival Cruise Line. The incident comes at a time when Carnival (NYSE:CCL) is trading at $24.64, with the stock down 6.6% over the past week and down 15.7% over the past month. Shares are also down 20.3%...
